sentences.target: Ich finde die Bürste im Bad nicht.
sentences.reading: /ɪç ˈfɪndə diː ˈbʏʁstə ɪm baːt nɪçt./

translations.de: Ich finde die Bürste im Bad nicht.
translations.ipa: /ɪç ˈfɪndə diː ˈbʏʁstə ɪm baːt nɪçt./
translations.en: I can’t find the brush in the bathroom.
translations.es: No encuentro el cepillo en el baño.
translations.fr: Je ne trouve pas la brosse dans la salle de bain.
translations.it: Non trovo la spazzola in bagno.
translations.zh-Hans: 我在浴室里找不到梳子。
translations.ru: Я не могу найти щётку в ванной.
translations.pt: Não encontro a escova no banheiro.
translations.he: אני לא מוצא את המברשת בחדר האמבטיה.
translations.vi: Tôi không tìm thấy bàn chải tóc trong phòng tắm.
translations.nl: Ik kan de borstel niet vinden in de badkamer.
translations.uk: Я не можу знайти щітку у ванній.
translations.hu: Nem találom a hajkefét a fürdőszobában.
translations.hi: मुझे बाथरूम में बालों का ब्रश नहीं मिल रहा है.
translations.pl: Nie mogę znaleźć szczotki w łazience.
translations.el: Δεν μπορώ να βρω τη βούρτσα στο μπάνιο.
translations.nb: Jeg finner ikke børsten på badet.
translations.id: Aku tidak menemukan sikat rambut di kamar mandi.
translations.sv: Jag kan inte hitta borsten i badrummet.
translations.da: Jeg kan ikke finde børsten på badeværelset.
translations.ja: バスルームでブラシが見つからない。

tokens.explanation: 1st-person singular nominative personal pronoun; subject of the clause.
Finite main verb, present tense, 1st person singular; takes a direct accusative object.
Definite article, feminine accusative singular; agrees with 'Bürste' and marks it as direct object.
Common noun, feminine accusative singular; direct object of 'finde'.
Contraction of 'in dem' (in + the); preposition introducing a dative locative phrase.
Common noun, neuter dative singular; object of the preposition 'im', indicating location.
Negation particle; negates the predicate.

sentences.target: Du brauchst die Bürste für den Hund.
sentences.reading: /duː ˈbʁaʊ̯xst diː ˈbʏʁstə fyːɐ̯ deːn hʊnt./

translations.de: Du brauchst die Bürste für den Hund.
translations.ipa: /duː ˈbʁaʊ̯xst diː ˈbʏʁstə fyːɐ̯ deːn hʊnt./
translations.en: You need the brush for the dog.
translations.es: Necesitas el cepillo para el perro.
translations.fr: Tu as besoin de la brosse pour le chien.
translations.it: Ti serve la spazzola per il cane.
translations.pt: Você precisa da escova para o cachorro.
translations.vi: Bạn cần bàn chải cho con chó.
translations.nl: Je hebt de borstel voor de hond nodig.
translations.hu: Szükséged van egy kefére a kutyához.
translations.hi: तुम्हें कुत्ते के लिए ब्रश चाहिए.
translations.el: Χρειάζεσαι τη βούρτσα για τον σκύλο.
translations.ro: Ai nevoie de peria pentru câine.
translations.da: Du har brug for børsten til hunden.
translations.ja: 犬用のブラシが必要だ。

tokens.explanation: 2nd-person singular nominative personal pronoun; subject of the clause.
Finite main verb, present tense, 2nd person singular; governs an accusative direct object.
Definite article, feminine accusative singular; marks 'Bürste' as the direct object.
Common noun, feminine accusative singular; direct object of 'brauchst'.
Preposition governing the accusative; introduces a beneficiary/purpose phrase.
Definite article, masculine accusative singular; agrees with 'Hund' as object of 'für'.
Common noun, masculine accusative singular; object of the preposition 'für'.

sentences.target: Er legt die Bürste neben das Waschbecken.
sentences.reading: /eːɐ̯ leːkt diː ˈbʏʁstə ˈneːbən das ˈvaʃˌbɛkn̩./

translations.de: Er legt die Bürste neben das Waschbecken.
translations.ipa: /eːɐ̯ leːkt diː ˈbʏʁstə ˈneːbən das ˈvaʃˌbɛkn̩./
translations.en: He puts the brush next to the sink.
translations.es: Él pone el cepillo al lado del lavabo.
translations.fr: Il pose la brosse à côté du lavabo.
translations.it: Appoggia la spazzola accanto al lavandino.
translations.zh-Hans: 他把梳子放在洗手池旁边。
translations.yue: 佢將把梳放喺洗手盤旁邊。
translations.ru: Он кладёт щётку рядом с раковиной.
translations.pt: Ele coloca a escova ao lado da pia.
translations.he: הוא מניח את המברשת ליד הכיור.
translations.vi: Anh ấy đặt bàn chải tóc cạnh bồn rửa.
translations.nl: Hij legt de borstel naast de wastafel.
translations.hu: A mosdókagyló mellé teszi a kefét.
translations.hi: वह बालों का ब्रश सिंक के पास रखता है.
translations.el: Αφήνει τη βούρτσα δίπλα στον νιπτήρα.
translations.nb: Han legger børsten ved siden av vasken.
translations.id: Dia meletakkan sikat rambut di samping wastafel.
translations.da: Han lægger børsten ved siden af vasken.
translations.ja: 彼は洗面台の横にブラシを置く。

tokens.explanation: 3rd-person singular nominative personal pronoun; subject of the clause.
Finite main verb, present tense, 3rd person singular; placement verb taking an accusative direct object and a directional PP.
Definite article, feminine accusative singular; marks 'Bürste' as direct object.
Common noun, feminine accusative singular; direct object of 'legt'.
Two-way preposition (Wechselpräposition); here with accusative to indicate motion towards a location.
Definite article, neuter accusative singular; agrees with 'Waschbecken' as object of 'neben'.
Common noun, neuter accusative singular; object of the preposition 'neben'.

translations.en: My brush is in the backpack.
translations.es: Mi cepillo está en la mochila.
translations.fr: Ma brosse est dans le sac à dos.
translations.it: La mia spazzola è nello zaino.
translations.vi: Bàn chải tóc của tôi ở trong ba lô.
translations.nl: Mijn borstel zit in mijn rugzak.
translations.hi: मेरा बालों का ब्रश बैकपैक में है.
translations.el: Η βούρτσα μου είναι στο σακίδιο.
translations.id: Sikat rambut saya ada di dalam ransel.
translations.ja: 私のブラシはリュックの中にある。

tokens.explanation: Possessive determiner, feminine nominative singular; agrees with 'Bürste' and marks possession.
Common noun, feminine nominative singular; subject of the clause.
Finite auxiliary 'sein' used as copula, present tense, 3rd person singular; links subject to the locative predicate.
Contraction of 'in dem' (in + the); preposition selecting dative; introduces a locative PP.
Common noun, masculine dative singular; object of 'im', indicating location.
